home.title: Home
home.description: Vest Visuals is a professional photography and videography studio specializing in weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and marketing content. We deliver high-quality images and video tailored to your needs, with reliable service and fast turnaround for clients across the region.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact Vest Visuals to discuss your photography or videography project. We cover weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and marketing shoots. Request a quote, ask a question, or book your session, we typically reply within one business day.
contact.og-subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll handle the rest

hero.title: The moments that <accent>matter,</accent> captured <accent2>right.</accent2>
hero.description: Weddings, events, portraits, automotive, real estate, and brand work, shot and edited by a studio that actually cares how it turns out. Wherever your story takes place, we're there for it.

about.title: Small studio, <accent>full attention.</accent>
about.description: We started Vest Visuals because we love this work and we're picky about how it's done. From the first message to the final gallery, you're talking to the people actually behind the camera and the edit. We take on projects we can give our full attention to, so nothing about your shoot feels rushed or generic.
about.description-1: Has a rare eye for light and for the moments that won't happen twice.
about.description-2: Gives rhythm, sound, and emotion to what would otherwise be just clips.

portfolio.title: See it <accent>for yourself.</accent>
portfolio.description: A handful of recent projects we're proud of. Quality over quantity, every time.

automotive.name: <accent>Automotive</accent>
automotive.description: Cars that look like the ad

before-and-after.title: Same frame. <accent>Whole new feeling.</accent>
before-and-after.description: Good editing is the part nobody talks about and everybody notices. Pull the slider and watch a raw shot turn into the final look, all in the color, contrast, and mood.

locations.title: Wherever the <accent>shoot takes us.</accent>
locations.description: A good project is worth the drive. We pack the gear and show up wherever you need us, near or far.

other.name: Somewhere else?
other.description: We travel across the country for the right shoot

contact.title: Got something in mind? <accent>Let's talk.</accent>
contact.description: Send us a few details about what you need and you'll hear back within one business day.

home.title: Home
home.description: Vest Visuals is a full-service software development company building web and mobile apps, custom internal tools, SaaS products, and cloud & DevOps solutions for startups, SMBs, and enterprises worldwide. Partner with our remote-first team to design, build, and scale reliable software tailored to your business.
home.og-subtitle: Building web, mobile & cloud software that scales

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Get in touch with Vest Visuals to discuss your software project. Reach our remote-first team for web and mobile apps, custom tools, SaaS, and cloud & DevOps solutions. Request a quote, ask a question, or schedule a free consultation, we typically reply within one business day.
contact.og-subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll take it from there

hero.title: A small studio for software worth keeping.
hero.description: We're a handful of senior engineers in Timișoara, building web and mobile products, internal systems, and data tooling for clients worldwide. Small on purpose, so the people who scope your project are the same ones who write the code.

services.title: A full product team, without the headcount.
services.description: Most studios specialize narrowly or pad teams with juniors. We do neither. A few senior generalists cover the whole lifecycle, from the first whiteboard sketch to the production deploy and everything that keeps it running after.
services.s1-d: Web and mobile apps that feel considered in the details and hold up under real use. We care as much about the edge cases as the happy path.
services.s2-d: The tools your business actually runs on. We turn brittle spreadsheets and manual handoffs into software your team trusts.
services.s3-d: Pipelines, analytics, and cloud setups that make data usable and deploys uneventful. The unglamorous work that everything else depends on.
services.s4-d: Sometimes you need judgment more than hands. We advise on architecture, untangle inherited codebases, and help teams decide what's worth building.

testimonials.title: The work speaks, but they did too.
testimonials.description: A few words from the people we've built for.

faq.title: Before you reach out.
faq.description: Anything else on your mind? Write to us at <email>contact@vestvisuals.ro</email> and we'll answer plainly.
faq.q1: What does it cost to work with you?
faq.a1: We bill for time and materials, transparently. You see exactly where the hours go and keep the freedom to change direction as the work teaches you what matters. No fixed scope quietly going stale, no padded estimates.
faq.a2: Small enough that you'll know everyone working on your project by name, and that the senior engineer in the discovery call is the one writing your code. That's the point, not a limitation.
faq.q3: Do you work with clients outside Romania?
faq.a3: Most of our work is remote and international. We're used to working across time zones and have a rhythm for keeping distributed projects clear and on track.
faq.q4: Can you take over something that's already been started?
faq.a4: Yes, and we often do. Inherited codebases, half-finished builds, or a project that's outgrown whoever started it. We'll assess honestly what's salvageable before suggesting a rewrite.
faq.q5: What do you need from us to start?
faq.a5: A conversation. You don't need a finished spec or technical documents, just a clear sense of the problem. We'll help shape it into something buildable.
faq.q6: What happens when the project ends?
faq.a6: You own every line of code from day one. We hand off clean documentation, and we're around if you want ongoing support, but you're never locked in.

contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.description: Tell us what you're building and we'll reply within one business day. If we're the right fit, we'll set up a short call; if we're not, we'll happily point you toward someone who is.
